message:
test(e2e): add metrics-forwarder e2e test verifying data-plane scraping

Add EnsureMetricsForwarderWorking e2e test that verifies the full
metrics forwarding chain from the guest cluster's Prometheus through
the metrics-forwarder to the management-side metrics-proxy.

The test enables metrics forwarding, waits for management-side
deployments (endpoint-resolver, metrics-proxy) and the guest-side
metrics-forwarder, then execs into the guest cluster's prometheus
pod to verify kube-apiserver targets are UP via the Prometheus
targets API and queries for actual apiserver_request_total metrics.

Also adds endpoint-resolver to expectedKasManagementComponents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
